messages: {"parts":[{"tool_name":"edit_file_llm","args":"{\"target_file\": \"/home/workspace/Skills/pulse/scripts/pulse.py\", \"instructions\": \"In the spawn_drop function, fix the f-string template issue. The problem is that the JSON example in the DEPOSIT FORMAT section has curly braces that conflict with f-string interpolation.\\n\\nReplace the DEPOSIT FORMAT section (the json code block with curly braces) with plain text instructions that don't use JSON curly braces inside the f-string.\", \"code_edit\": \"async def spawn_drop(slug: str, drop_id: str, brief: str, model: str = None) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Spawn a Drop via /zo/ask, return conversation_id\\n    \\n    Note: The /zo/ask API may not return the actual conversation_id.\\n    We generate a tracking ID but rely on deposit detection for completion.\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    token = os.environ.get(\\\"ZO_CLIENT_IDENTITY_TOKEN\\\")\\n    if not token:\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\"ZO_CLIENT_IDENTITY_TOKEN not set\\\")\\n    \\n    # Build deposit format as separate string to avoid f-string escaping issues\\n    deposit_format = '''\\n{\\n  \\\"drop_id\\\": \\\"''' + drop_id + '''\\\",\\n  \\\"status\\\": \\\"complete\\\",\\n  \\\"summary\\\": \\\"What you accomplished\\\",\\n  \\\"artifacts\\\": [\\\"list\\\", \\\"of\\\", \\\"files\\\", \\\"created\\\"],\\n  \\\"learnings\\\": [\\\"any lessons for other workers\\\"],\\n  \\\"errors\\\": []\\n}'''\\n    \\n    full_prompt = f\\\"\\\"\\\"You are a Pulse Drop executing build \\\"{slug}\\\", task \\\"{drop_id}\\\".\\n\\n**YOUR IDENTITY:**\\n- Build: {slug}\\n- Drop ID: {drop_id}\\n- Type: Headless worker (no human in loop)\\n\\n**EXECUTION PROTOCOL:**\\n1. Read the brief below carefully\\n2. Execute the task completely\\n3. When done, write your deposit JSON to: N5/builds/{slug}/deposits/{drop_id}.json\\n4. DO NOT commit code (orchestrator handles commits)\\n5. If blocked, write deposit with status \\\"blocked\\\" and explain why\\n\\n**DEPOSIT FORMAT:**\\n```json{deposit_format}\\n```\\n\\nStatus can be \\\"complete\\\", \\\"blocked\\\", or \\\"partial\\\".\\n\\n---\\nBRIEF:\\n{brief}\\n---\\n\\nExecute the brief now. Write deposit when done.\\\"\\\"\\\"\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01JLGBYak5n5kMAwC4hgu1Zc","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":58688,"cache_write_tokens":345,"cache_read_tokens":58342,"output_tokens":608,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":345,"cache_read_input_tokens":58342,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":608}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:26:22.297442Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01As67cr9co5a1owbeoT7ve3","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"97a0d03b-2869-42c4-a37e-2bcbaa05238f","metadata":null}
